meta.phase-name: Model-Driven Space Selection and Tree Authoring

phase-plan.purpose: Ensure model-space controls are explicitly model-driven and authorable from the model tree workflow.
phase-plan.scope: Add a model dropdown sourced from runtime model schemas (same source as tree), bind model-space options to selected model, and enable creating new model schemas directly inside the model tree modal.

file.description: Model selector, schema-aligned view options, and model-tree create flow.
